questions.hint: Use the power rule for integration.

questions.prompt: The figure below shows several effective radiative forcing categories. Which category has the largest positive contribution?

image.alt: Bar chart of effective radiative forcing by source

questions.answer: Carbon dioxide has the largest positive contribution in the chart.
questions.hint: Look for the longest bar extending to the right.

questions.prompt: Work through both parts of the question.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: State one reason an image used in a question should keep its aspect ratio.
parts.answer: To avoid distortion and keep the figure readable.

parts.label: (b)
parts.hint: Work out each square before adding.

questions.answer: Part (a): preserve the figure's proportions so it stays readable. Part (b): \(5^2 + 12^2 = 169\).
